27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Product Listings
27.evidenceText: Five distinct product page URLs identified: p1993548.html (80mm schwarz), p1993546.html (40mm schwarz), p1993547.html (60mm schwarz), p1993551.html (80mm Kupfer), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer)
27.extractionRationale: Counted each unique product page URL as a separate listing. All 5 sources represent distinct CoreCap product pages with different sizes and/or colors. No duplicates or accessories were counted.

30.evidenceText: 5 product listings examined: No stock status information (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft) found in any of the provided content snippets from BIKE24
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided evidence. The 5 sources only contain product descriptions and features without any mention of availability or stock status. The provided content appears to be truncated product pages lacking critical stock information.

56.evidenceText: Distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve identified: No. 17 (28"), No. 15 (28"/700C), No. 17-EL (28"), No. 15L (28"), No. 14 (27.5"/650B), No. 19L (27.5"/28"/29"), No. 19-EL (27.5"/28"/29"), No. 7 (20"), No. 10 (24")
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models/SKUs with Clik Valve (SCV) designation from the five sources. Each unique tube number and size combination represents one SKU. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit), valves, and pump adapters as instructed.
